mapper.insert: INSERT INTO doctor_schedules (doctor_id, department_id, schedule_type, start_time, end_time, room) VALUES (#{doctorId}, #{departmentId}, #{scheduleType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{room})
mapper.update: UPDATE doctor_schedules SET doctor_id = #{doctorId}, department_id = #{departmentId}, schedule_type = #{scheduleType}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, room = #{room} WHERE id = #{id}
